arguments.argument: The moral importance of privacy cannot be overstated, especially when it comes to protecting the most vulnerable members of society.

arguments.justification_for_response: Sustainability requires that we ensure the system remains effective and trusted over time. If the service becomes unreliable, the consequences for vulnerable users will far outweigh any hypothetical risks of data misuse.
